items.summary: On the PDF Report page (RapportPDFPage.tsx), add a third period selection mode called 'Custom Range' (alongside the existing 'Month' and 'Year' modes). This mode must allow the user to pick a start date and an end date freely (e.g., January 1st to March 31st). The existing table format used for monthly and yearly reports must be reused unchanged for this custom range output.

Update the data aggregation logic in RapportPDFPage.tsx to support filtering appointments by an arbitrary date range (start timestamp to end timestamp), so that the custom range period feeds into the same report-building pipeline used by month and year modes.
